titles_tesim: Menologion. Lives of Saints for month of Ilul (September)
contents_tesim: Menologion. Lives of Saints for month of Ilul (September)
Menologion. Lives of Saints for month of Ilul (September), beginning on the 21st with the Prophet Jonas and ending on the 30th with Gregory Bishop of Armenia
paracontent_tesim: And it was [i.e. copying finished] in the Year of Our Father Adam [Anno Mundi] 6837 …, which happened at Holy Mount Sinai Monastery …
وذلك بتأريخ سنة ستة آلاف وثمانمائة وسبع وثلاثين لأبونا آدم احن الله العافي (؟) وذلك بدير طور سيناء المقدس وهو برسم كنيسة السيدة
